transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Good morning. What brings you in today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Good morning, doctor. I've just been feeling really tired lately.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: And when I check my sugars at home, the numbers have been higher than usual.

transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Since when have you been noticing these changes?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's been about three weeks now.

transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Any changes in the routine lately?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: My daughter's wedding was a few weeks ago, so I've been eating more sweets and carbs than usual.

transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Your BP is one forty six one ninety. I'm adding a couple of more medicines.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Do I take it with metformin?

transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Yes. Take it with the other medicine that you are using right now.

subjective: Patient has been noticing higher than usual sugar numbers at home
Recent increase in sweets and carbs consumption due to daughter's wedding
objective: Patient is currently taking Sertraline 100mg OD and Levothyroxine 75mcg OD
plan: Add new medication for hypertension and hyperglycemia management
Take new medication with current medications, including metformin if prescribed
Follow up with doctor to monitor blood sugar and blood pressure levels
Recommendation to reduce sweets and carbs intake

aiSummary.narrative: The patient presents with symptoms of tiredness and elevated sugar numbers, which may be related to recent dietary changes. The doctor has identified hypertension and hyperglycemia, and a new medication is being added to the patient's current regimen of Sertraline and Levothyroxine. The patient should follow up with the doctor to monitor their condition and consider reducing their intake of sweets and carbs.
medications: New medication for hypertension and hyperglycemia (exact name not specified in transcript)
warnings: Monitor for potential interactions between new medication and current medications
Caution with increased sugar intake and its impact on hyperglycemia management
